name: Blue Ribbon Butterscotch Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In an iron skillet, melt the butter and brown sugar over medium heat, stirring constantly.
2. Stir in the flour.
3. Beat the egg yolks and milk together and add to the skillet mixture. Stir constantly.
4. Add the salt and vanilla. Continue stirring until the mixture is thick.
5. Allow the mixture to cool.
6. Pour into a baked pie shell.
7. Make a meringue with egg whites.
8. Bake at 400°F until the meringue is golden.
